response: A small blue Euro plug needs to be inserted into a wall socket. You have three options: a small round-pin socket, a large round-pin socket, or a large flat-pin socket. Which one should you use?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a small blue Euro plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the small round-pin socket, the large round-pin socket, or the large flat-pin socket. Which one?
